message:
feat(providers): add stackit/ollama/v0 providers and auth fallback key chains for moonshotai/alibaba

Expand the provider registry with three new providers and improve auth
key resolution with fallback chains for Chinese AI providers:

New providers:
- stackit: OpenAI-compatible preset for STACKIT cloud (German cloud infra),
  STACKIT_API_KEY env, endpoint api.openai-compat.model-serving.eu01.onstackit.cloud
- ollama (local): OpenAI-compatible preset for local Ollama at 127.0.0.1:11434,
  no auth key required (auth_header=false), distinct from ollama-cloud
- v0 (Vercel): registered as NativeAdapterRequired (no routing defaults yet),
  V0_API_KEY env, awaiting API endpoint publication

Auth fallback chains:
- moonshotai: auth_env_keys expanded from ["MOONSHOT_API_KEY"] to
  ["MOONSHOT_API_KEY", "KIMI_API_KEY"] — allows users who set KIMI_API_KEY
  (the consumer-facing brand name) to authenticate without reconfiguration
- alibaba: auth_env_keys expanded from ["DASHSCOPE_API_KEY"] to
  ["DASHSCOPE_API_KEY", "QWEN_API_KEY"] — same pattern for Qwen users

Auth tests added (src/auth.rs):
- test_resolve_api_key_groq_env_beats_stored: env var takes precedence
- test_resolve_api_key_qwen_uses_qwen_env_fallback: QWEN_API_KEY works
  when DASHSCOPE_API_KEY is empty
- test_resolve_api_key_kimi_uses_kimi_env_fallback: KIMI_API_KEY works
  when MOONSHOT_API_KEY is empty
- test_resolve_api_key_primary_env_wins_over_alias_fallback: primary
  env key always wins over secondary alias key
- Updated env_keys_for_provider assertions for moonshotai/alibaba chains

Error hint tests added (src/error.rs):
- hints_provider_key_hint_groq: 401 error suggests GROQ_API_KEY
- hints_provider_key_hint_alias_dashscope: now suggests both
  DASHSCOPE_API_KEY and QWEN_API_KEY
- hints_provider_key_hint_alias_kimi: suggests both MOONSHOT_API_KEY
  and KIMI_API_KEY
- Error hint completeness matrix expanded with moonshotai/alibaba entries

Provider metadata tests updated:
- batch_c1 test renamed to batch_c1_metadata_resolves_all_five_providers
  (added ollama), routing defaults test includes ollama with auth_header=false
- v0 test: NativeAdapterRequired mode, V0_API_KEY, no routing defaults
- moonshotai auth assertion updated for dual-key chain
- ollama auth_env_keys verified as empty (local, no auth)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
